title: Investment Memo: Northstar Analytics
content: Recommendation: proceed to partner diligence with valuation discipline.

children.title: Market Analysis
children.content: Mid-market finance teams face fragmented forecasting workflows; a focused analytics wedge has credible demand.

children.title: Financial Analysis
children.content: Revenue growth is promising, but the current burn profile requires milestone-based financing.

children.title: Competition Analysis
children.content: The company differentiates through workflow integration while competing with suites and point solutions.

children.title: Risk Analysis
children.content: Primary risks are sales-cycle length, platform dependency, and valuation; diligence gates are defined for each.
